languages.text: "Вздумали посеять между нами рознь? Жалкий замысел. Она — его дочь, я — сенешаль. И, в отличие от Ювенны, я не забываю о своем долге. Я приговариваю вас к смерти за лжесвидетельство и за то, что вы посмели очернить имя фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: "Вздумали посеять между нами рознь? Жалкий замысел. Она — его дочь, я — сенешаль. И, в отличие от Ювенны, я не забываю о своем долге. Я приговариваю вас к смерти за лжесвидетельство и за то, что вы посмели очернить имя фон Валанциус".

languages.text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."
languages.original_text: "Вздумали посеять между нами рознь? Жалкий замысел. Она — его дочь, я — сенешаль. И, в отличие от Ювенны, я не забываю о своем долге. Я приговариваю вас к смерти за лжесвидетельство и за то, что вы посмели очернить имя фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

"You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

"You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

languages.text: “你是想挑拨我们之间的关系吗？真可笑。她是他的女儿，我是他的总领。而且跟尤文娜不同，我还没忘记自己的职责。你伪造证词，还胆敢玷污冯·瓦兰修斯之名，我将判处你死刑。”
languages.original_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: “你是想挑拨我们之间的关系吗？真可笑。她是他的女儿，我是他的总领。而且跟尤文娜不同，我还没忘记自己的职责。你伪造证词，还胆敢玷污冯·瓦兰修斯之名，我将判处你死刑。”

languages.text: « Vous cherchez à semer la discorde entre nous ? Quel triste stratagème. Elle est sa fille, je suis sa sénéchale. Et contrairement à Juvenna, je n'ai pas oublié mon devoir. Je vous condamne à mort pour faux témoignage et pour avoir osé salir le nom des von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: « Vous cherchez à semer la discorde entre nous ? Quel triste stratagème. Elle est sa fille, je suis sa sénéchale. Et contrairement à Juvenna, je n'ai pas oublié mon devoir. Je vous condamne à mort pour faux témoignage et pour avoir osé salir le nom des von Valancius. »

languages.text: "Aramıza nifak tohumları mı ekmeye çalışıyorsunuz? Ne büyük zavallılık. O öz kızı, bense Seneşalim. Ayrıca Juvenna'nın aksine ben vazifemi bir an bile terk etmedim. Yalancı şahitlikten ve von Valancius adına leke sürmeye kalkışmaktan sizi ölüme mahkûm ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Aramıza nifak tohumları mı ekmeye çalışıyorsunuz? Ne büyük zavallılık. O öz kızı, bense Seneşalim. Ayrıca Juvenna'nın aksine ben vazifemi bir an bile terk etmedim. Yalancı şahitlikten ve von Valancius adına leke sürmeye kalkışmaktan sizi ölüme mahkûm ediyorum."

languages.text: «¿Pretende sembrar la discordia entre nosotras? Es un truco patético. Ella es su hija y yo soy la Senescal. Y, al contrario que Juvenna, no he olvidado mi deber. L{mf|e|a} condeno a muerte por falso testimonio y por osar mancillar el nombre von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: «¿Pretende sembrar la discordia entre nosotras? Es un truco patético. Ella es su hija y yo soy la Senescal. Y, al contrario que Juvenna, no he olvidado mi deber. L{mf|e|a} condeno a muerte por falso testimonio y por osar mancillar el nombre von Valancius».

languages.text: "Ihr wollt Zwietracht zwischen uns säen? Wie armselig. Sie ist seine Tochter, ich bin die Truchsessin. Und im Gegensatz zu Juvenna habe ich meine Pflicht nicht vergessen. Ich verurteile Euch zum Tode, weil Ihr falsches Zeugnis abgelegt und den Namen von Valancius beschmutzt habt."
languages.original_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wollt Zwietracht zwischen uns säen? Wie armselig. Sie ist seine Tochter, ich bin die Truchsessin. Und im Gegensatz zu Juvenna habe ich meine Pflicht nicht vergessen. Ich verurteile Euch zum Tode, weil Ihr falsches Zeugnis abgelegt und den Namen von Valancius beschmutzt habt."

languages.text: 「君が我々を対立させる意図があるのか？哀れな策略だ。彼女は彼の娘、私は執事だ。そしてユベナとは異なり、私は私の義務を忘れたことはない。偽証とフォン・ヴァランシウスの名誉を傷つける行為で、君を死刑に処する。」
languages.original_text: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: 「君が我々を対立させる意図があるのか？哀れな策略だ。彼女は彼の娘、私は執事だ。そしてユベナとは異なり、私は私の義務を忘れたことはない。偽証とフォン・ヴァランシウスの名誉を傷つける行為で、君を死刑に処する。」
